stages.name: Receiver
stages.description: Syslog, File Tail, OTLP gRPC/HTTP, Webhook — raw bytes arrive

stages.name: Parser
stages.description: Drain3 template + params → entity extract → SeerflowEvent

stages.name: Detection
stages.description: HST + Holt-Winters + CUSUM + Markov + DSPOT → blended score + Sigma rules

stages.name: Correlation
stages.description: Entity graph (igraph) + risk accumulation + kill-chain progression
